name: Data Exfiltration Response
description: Response playbook for confirmed or suspected data exfiltration incidents. Focuses on containment, evidence collection, and regulatory notification.

steps.name: Block exfiltration channels
steps.description: Block outbound connections to identified exfiltration endpoints. Enable DLP in block mode for affected network segments.

steps.name: Identify data scope
steps.description: Determine what data was accessed and potentially exfiltrated. Correlate DLP logs, proxy logs, and endpoint telemetry.

steps.name: Preserve evidence chain
steps.description: Capture full packet captures, memory dumps, and timeline artifacts. Maintain chain of custody documentation.

steps.name: Assess regulatory requirements
steps.description: Determine which regulatory frameworks apply (GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS). Identify notification deadlines and required parties.

steps.name: Notify stakeholders
steps.description: Brief CISO, legal counsel, and affected business unit leadership. Prepare public disclosure statement if required.

steps.name: Remediate access
steps.description: Revoke compromised credentials. Patch exploited vulnerabilities. Implement additional monitoring on affected data stores.
